description: English mixed with Spanish and French phrases. 'Mañana'/'demain' = tomorrow, 'rendez-vous' = meeting, 'parfait' = perfect, 'oui oui' = yes yes, 'lo siento' = sorry, 'à bientôt' = see you soon. Casual catch-up tomorrow at noon at the café.

events.title: Catch-up
events.reasoning: Despite multilingual code-switching, the scheduling intent is clear: 'rendez-vous tomorrow'/'mañana'/'demain' all mean tomorrow (2026-02-21). 'Noon' is confirmed as the time. The location is 'the café on main'. Duration is approximately one hour.
events.assumptions: Duration assumed 1 hour per Alice's 'maybe an hour or so'. 'Mañana', 'demain', and 'tomorrow' all resolve to 2026-02-21. 'Rendez-vous' interpreted as meeting/catch-up.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: casual catch-up tomorrow at noon at the café on main with Alice and Carol.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tomorrow = 2026-02-21. Multilingual terms: 'rendez-vous' (French: meeting), 'mañana' (Spanish: tomorrow), 'demain' (French: tomorrow), 'parfait' (French: perfect), 'oui oui' (French: yes yes), 'lo siento' (Spanish: sorry), 'à bientôt' (French: see you soon).
